meta.purpose: Track where competitor search APIs/providers appear in public benchmark, score, and evaluation contexts.

appearances.details: FACTS Search official leaderboard uses Brave Search API as the fixed search tool for all model evaluations.
Tavily's public eval framework supports Tavily, Exa, Brave, Google via Serper, Perplexity Search, Perplexity, and GPTR. It includes SimpleQA and a document relevance benchmark.
Exa is one of the out-of-the-box providers supported by Tavily's public search API eval framework.
Brave is one of the out-of-the-box providers supported by Tavily's public search API eval framework.
Tavily reports 93.33% accuracy on OpenAI SimpleQA using Tavily real-time search and GPT-4.1 answer generation.

Exa published API evals for SimpleQA and a MSMARCO-inspired search result relevance evaluation. The page states Exa tops its SimpleQA chart but the accessible text exposes methodology more clearly than exact table values.

score_or_metric.value: Brave AI Grounding F1 92.1%, Acc 90.78%, Acc* 93.4%; AI Grounding Research With Reasoning multi-search F1 94.1%, Acc 93.25%, Acc* 94.9%

appearances.details: Brave compares Brave AI Grounding against Perplexity, Tavily, and Exa on SimpleQA-style metrics.
Brave's comparison table lists Tavily + GPT-4.1 with Acc* 93.3%. This is a Brave-published comparison and should be displayed as vendor-published.

score_or_metric.value: Exa Unknown 85.83%; Exa Research 91.6%; Exa Research Pro 94.9%

appearances.details: Brave's comparison table lists several Exa-related SimpleQA values. This is a Brave-published comparison and should be displayed as vendor-published.
AIMultiple reports Brave Search as the top Agent Score provider in its 2026 agentic search benchmark and reports 669 ms latency.
AIMultiple reports Exa ranked third overall with Agent Score 14.39 and around 1.2 s latency.
AIMultiple reports Tavily ranked fifth overall with Agent Score 13.67 and around 998 ms latency.

score_or_metric.value: GPT-4.1 w/ Exa Search MCP 58.67%; o4-mini w/ Exa Search MCP 61.73%; o3 w/ Exa Search MCP 56.12%; Sonnet 4 w/ Exa Search MCP 67.13%

appearances.details: Parallel's WISER-Search comparison includes Exa Search MCP/tool calling against Parallel MCP and native search across multiple LLMs.

Parallel compares OpenAI web search, Parallel, Exa, and Tavily on architecture, cost, freshness, and benchmark claims; Tavily appears as a compared provider rather than in a directly extractable table in the accessible text.

score_or_metric.value: Exa 91% on SimpleQA and 24% on FreshQA as reported by Parallel

appearances.details: Parallel's comparison article references Exa benchmark performance on SimpleQA and FreshQA. This should be shown as vendor-published comparison, not independent benchmark truth.
